channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Grassley: Democrats Who Weaponized DOJ Hate Blanche, Which Proves He's a Good AG Pick
item.description: Senator Grassley says that just before a hearing or vote, another accusation emerges against a Trump nominee.

item.title: College in America Needs an Overhaul
item.description: A 20th-century system has created perverse incentives in the 21st century.

item.title: New Docs Support Allegations That Jack Smith's Team Violated Constitution in Get-Trump Probe
item.description: Newly released evidence raises questions about what other rights the special counsel's office may have violated.

item.title: Trump Doesn't Have the Stomach for This
item.description: The president should end the protracted humiliation in Iran quickly, the author argues.
